title: Craftable Music Discs
description: Allows users to be able to craft music discs via a crafting table.
body:
# Craftable Music Discs

### Information
Craftable Music Discs is a datapack that allows users to craft vanilla music discs inside of a crafting table. Images of the recipes can be found within the datapack's [Gallery](/datapack/craftable-music-discs/gallery). However, all recipes are shapeless, and as such, can be placed in any order of the crafting table.

### Origin Story
I originally made this datapack so that users on a server I manage, can gather quantities of music discs at ease, to put custom audio on them with [Audioplayer](/mod/audioplayer) - an addon to the [Simple Voice Chat](/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod/plugin.
